_EnableHardlinking_help: MUST be true for F1Carreras. Upstream README says false is the default and that Sonarr should handle file management, but Sonarr's parser can't reconcile year-as-season filenames like Formula1.2026... -- it interprets the year as S20E26. Formulaar1 needs to hardlink the file with an SxxExx-bearing name so Sonarr can import it. See OPERATIONS.md.
